case_title: MULTIFAMILY TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. STONE MOUNTAIN PROPERTIES 806, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
